headline: Prologis GIC Venture Aims To Scale Custom Logistics And Investor Income
summary: Prologis, NYSE:PLD, has entered a $1.6b joint venture with GIC to develop build to suit logistics facilities in major U.S. markets. The partnership focuses on custom, long term leased properties that are tailored to individual tenant requirements. The venture combines Prologis' development and operating capabilities with institutional capital to expand its logistics real estate platform. For investors watching NYSE:PLD, this joint venture sits alongside a share price of $133.33 and a 1 year...
